title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-30
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the plants and updating the app metrics in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the repository.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory reflects the latest health and usage data without manual intervention.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee (Polly) and the Monitor Robot checking on plants in a greenhouse. The robot has a clipboard or screen showing metrics, representing the automated health checks.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot in a lush digital greenhouse. The robot holds a clipboard checking on glowing code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot in a lush digital greenhouse.
